name: Masquerading Task or Service
notes: This rule triggers when task or service masquerading.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Object Load Success

when the event matches ( LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'winmail.da%' OR LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'w64time%' OR ( LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '%w64time%' OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%w64time%' ) ) OR ( LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Full Full Name") LIKE 'pythonupdatesrvc' OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'pythonupdatesrvc' ) OR ( LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'c:\intel\' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'c:\amd\temp\') AND (LOWER("Filename") == 'outlook.dat' OR LOWER("Filename") == 'outlib.dll' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Masquerading Task or Service on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.Process Creation Success, Audit.Object Load Success

AND when the event matches ( 	LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'winmail.da%' 	OR 	LOWER("Filename") LIKE 'w64time%' 	OR  	( 		LOWER("Registry Value Data") MATCHES '%w64time%' 		OR LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%w64time%' 	) ) OR ( 	LOWER("Service Full Name Full Full Name Full Full Name") LIKE 'pythonupdatesrvc' 	OR LOWER("Process Full Full Name") LIKE 'pythonupdatesrvc' ) OR ( 	LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'c:\intel\' OR LOWER("File Directory") LIKE 'c:\amd\temp\') 	AND (LOWER("Filename") == 'outlook.dat' OR LOWER("Filename") == 'outlib.dll' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Masquerading Task or Service
Event description: Detects task or service masquerading
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
